大发旗下最靠谱的平台.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239183492_65161119<br>vk.com/topic-239183245_64467219<br>vk.com/topic-239226439_65342036<br>vk.com/topic-239218337_65994862<br>vk.com/topic-239142192_65161121<br>vk.com/topic-239218456_64872783<br>vk.com/topic-239149163_64719127<br>vk.com/topic-239226419_65341999<br>vk.com/topic-239226409_65342037<br>vk.com/topic-239213896_64872784<br>vk.com/topic-239182174_64548906<br>vk.com/topic-239226446_64872787<br>vk.com/topic-239149301_66211295<br>vk.com/topic-239183350_65616311<br>vk.com/topic-239142204_64548908<br>vk.com/topic-239142200_65616313<br>vk.com/topic-239226443_64719134<br>vk.com/topic-239153640_65616315<br>vk.com/topic-239226444_64548911<br>vk.com/topic-239226436_64872790<br>vk.com/topic-239183239_65342047<br>vk.com/topic-239218342_65161127<br>vk.com/topic-239183483_64719137<br>vk.com/topic-239218400_65616317<br>vk.com/topic-239183245_64467224<br>vk.com/topic-239218456_64872791<br>vk.com/topic-239149163_64719139<br>vk.com/topic-239226409_65342051<br>vk.com/topic-239226392_65161096<br>vk.com/topic-239149139_65342054<br>vk.com/topic-239226446_64872793<br>vk.com/topic-239149301_66211305<br>vk.com/topic-239142204_64548916<br>vk.com/t
